name: Create Pick'n Pack Shipping Labels or Consignments
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The pack order page displays a list of items that need to be packed for an order. The qty ordered is shown in the black "}, {"text": "Qty", "bold": true}, {"text": " column, the qty left to pack / ship shown in the green "}, {"text": "Ship", "bold": true}, {"text": " column."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Creating shipping labels / consignments for items automatically marks them as shipped / dispatched."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Creating Shipping Labels / Consignments"}], "data-id": "creating-shipping-labels-consignments"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Automatic consignments", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To have the system automatically generate a shipping label based on the shipping matrix setup touch \"automated consignment\". If you are coming directly from picking an order, the system will automatically do this step for you."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once created, you can edit the automatic label or add additional articles. To create a label for a different method or carrier close the popup and touch "}, {"text": "Custom Consignment", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Manual consignments", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a shipping label / consignment manually, touch "}, {"text": "Custom Consignment", "bold": true}, {"text": ".  You can then select the carrier you want to create a label for and define the consignment details."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Printing Shipping Labels & Other Documents", "bold": true}], "data-id": "printing-shipping-labels-other-documents"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To print a shipping label click on the "}, {"text": "Print Shipping Labels", "bold": true}, {"text": " button after you have saved and generated the label.  You can then select the print to print to.  You can also touch the "}, {"text": "Print Documents", "bold": true}, {"text": " button at the bottom of the page at any time to print shipping consignments and invoices."}]}]
